item.title: So the sea wall just gave up, and guess who's moving in? The fish.
Scientists called it 18 months ago. El Niño's here. Your grocery bill is about to have opinions.
item.description:
El Niño = chaos for crops
#ElNino #WeatherReality #SurvivalMode #ClimateHumor #PreparedNotScared #FarmLife #SpreadsheetLife #NatureWins
